objects.name: editorial_raw_articles
objects.note: article log; collaborations explode per editor

objects.name: editorial_raw_pod_history
objects.grain: year × month × kind × pod × client × role × person

objects.name: editorial_int_client_months
objects.note: the variance brain: delivered/invoiced/sow + Overview & D1 period assignment

objects.name: editorial_int_client_q_snapshot
objects.note: lifetime + current-Q + last-full-Q variance on both Overview & D1 paths

objects.name: editorial_int_member_months
objects.note: member utilization mart; a shared editor (home + support pods) has one row per pod — key by (year, month, pod, member), not (year, month, member)

objects.name: editorial_int_pod_assignments
objects.grain: year × month × kind × pod × client × role × person
objects.note: resolved per-month staffing (editorial + growth) — the backfill surface

objects.name: v_editorial_fct_goals_client_totals
objects.note: goal totals gated on weighted goal > 0

objects.name: v_editorial_fct_pod_assignments
objects.grain: year × month × pod × client × role × person

objects.name: v_editorial_fct_pod_snapshot
objects.note: Overview Pod Snapshot rollup, both pod axes

objects.name: v_editorial_production_committed
objects.note: editorial_raw_production minus hub-flagged forecast client-months (editorial_capacity_plan_demand.is_forecast); serving filter for the Production/OM surfaces

objects.name: v_editorial_roster
objects.note: single-source editorial roster (Rippling editors + Slack writers + legacy); carries canonical work_email — DISPLAY this, key on canonical_name/slack_id

objects.name: editorial_capacity_plan
objects.note: published capacity plan: supply, projected/actual demand, utilization

objects.name: editorial_capacity_plan_demand
objects.grain: ym × pod × client_id (NEGATIVE ids = planned/unsigned clients)
objects.note: published per-client demand incl. Hub edits (note/status_override); joins on client_id drop planned rows

objects.name: editorial_writer_desired
objects.note: writers' self-reported desired article total (Google Form) — published by EH's daily @writer-desired step, read by PH getWriterDesired() as the Writers-model capacity basis

objects.name: editorial_writer_plan
objects.note: published writer bandwidth plan (computed/override/effective bw, allocated, delivered)

objects.name: editorial_writer_plan_client_verticals
objects.note: client vertical tags for writer matching

objects.name: team_pod_assignments_editorial_history
objects.grain: ym × pod × client × role × person (soft-delete via deleted_at)
objects.note: canonical editorial assignment history — the Hub-first source this ETL reads (people-loop cutover 2026-06-12)

objects.name: v_company_roster
objects.note: ALL-company member roster (all Rippling employees + Slack writers + legacy), canonicalised — superset of v_editorial_roster (no editor filter, no exclusions) + is_editorial/role/title/department flags; the member-picker source
